title: ExtractedRecord
description: The structured record returned by a successful extraction. Conforms exactly to this schema with extra keys forbidden (FR-010). Frozen output of ExtractedRecord.model_json_schema(); the pydantic model is the source of truth (D-002). Required fields (FR-003) MUST NOT be nullable; optional fields (FR-004) MUST be nullable unions; enumerated fields include escape options (FR-005).

subject.description: The entity the record describes. Required (FR-003).

reported_at.description: ISO-8601 date/time as observed in the source. Required (FR-003).

nickname.description: Optional nickname. Nullable union per FR-004 — returning null when the source does not state one (NOT a fabricated value, NOT an empty string). Null rate on absent fixtures audited by FabricationMetric (SC-001, SC-004).

location.description: Optional location. Nullable union per FR-004 (see nickname).

status.description: Enumerated status. 'other' and 'unclear' are escape options per FR-005; they MUST be used when the source value does not map cleanly to 'active' / 'inactive' (spec Edge Case: value outside enumerated set, contradictory statements, mixed-language). 100% escape-routing on ambiguous fixtures is SC-003.

status_details.description: Paired details field for the status escape option (FR-005). MUST be a non-empty string whenever status in ['other', 'unclear']; enforced by the pydantic model_validator(mode='after') on ExtractedRecord.
